name: tessera
description: Tessera - a content-addressed version control system, built from first principles.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @tessera/core && npm run build -w @tessera/cli && npm run build -w @tessera/server && npm run build -w @tessera/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @tessera/core && npm run test -w @tessera/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @tessera/core && npm run typecheck -w @tessera/cli && npm run typecheck -w @tessera/server
